title: Alice of Wonderland in Paris
writer: Gene Deitch, Ludwig Bemelmans, Crockett Johnson
actors: Luce Ennis, Norma MacMillan, Howard Morris
plot: After Wonderland, Alice dreams of going to Paris. A mouse named Francois, the grandson of Anatole, agrees to take her there if she will tell him her favorite cheese. Along the way they share several stories.
